subject: refactor(styles): extract shared shadows, dropdowns, remove Platform.select duplication
body:
Replaced 14 manual Platform.select shadow definitions with shared boxShadow
constants. RN 0.81 supports boxShadow natively — Platform.select for
web vs native shadows is no longer needed.

Changes:
- Created src/styles/shadows.ts: 8 shadow constants (SHADOW_CARD through SHADOW_SHEET_LG)
- Created src/styles/dropdown.ts: shared DROPDOWN_CARD style for header menus
- Replaced hardcoded rgba overlays with withAlpha(colors.neutral/text, opacity)
- Replaced Toast platform-pixel padding (54/16/38px) with useSafeAreaInsets
- Replaced hardcoded maxHeight (160/280/300px) with viewport-relative values
- Removed unused Platform imports from 6 files

Net: -139 lines across 15 files. All 52 tests pass.

Tags: refactor, styles, shadows, cleanup, deduplication
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
